name: Jayaswal Neco Industries Limited
summary: Jayaswal Neco Industries Limited manufactures and sells steel products, and iron and steel castings primarily in India. It operates through Steel, Iron and Steel Castings, and Other segments. The company offers pig iron, billets, round and square hot rolled bars, sponge iron, pellets, coiled wire rods, and leaf spring flats; automotive products, such as cast iron and spheroidal graphite/ductile iron products; and construction casting products, such as pipes and fittings, and cast iron and ductile iron manhole covers. It also provides engineering products, such as steel plant products, valves, pumps; rolling, sugar, and wind mill products; and earth moving equipment. In addition, the company provides fabrication products, such as hot coke quenching car, scrap charging car, coke pusher beam, pallet car assembly, combustion chamber, elliptical ladle, EOT crane, cupola, heat exchanger, cooler shell, isolation gate for coke oven, and ducting chambers; gate, globe, check, ball, and plug valves in cast steel, stainless steel and alloy steel materials; refractory products, such as castables, bricks, and mortars; and defense equipment. Further, it trades in coal, coke, and PVC pipes. Jayaswal Neco Industries Limited was founded in 1902 and is based in Nagpur, India.
